sink_impls.notes: Production standard (grep-style) output. impl Sink block opens ~line 807; matched() at 810, context() at 851, context_break() at 877, binary_data() at 885, begin() at 903, finish() at 915.
Production JSON (--json) output. impl Sink block opens ~line 684; matched() at 687, context() at 729, binary_data() at 758, begin() at 775, finish() at 792.
Production summary (count/files-with-matches/quiet) output. impl Sink block opens ~line 646; matched() at 649, binary_data() at 691, begin() at 708, finish() at 726.
Closure-backed Sink receiving matches as &str. Struct at line 540, impl Sink ~line 545. Only implements matched().
Closure-backed Sink with lossy UTF-8 conversion. Struct at line 588, impl Sink ~line 593. Only implements matched().
Closure-backed Sink exposing raw bytes. Struct at line 638, impl Sink ~line 643. Only implements matched().

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search
call_chain.notes: Entry point. Dispatches to search_preprocessor (296), search_decompress (330), or search_path (340) depending on config flags.

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search_path
call_chain.notes: Opens the file at the given path, then delegates to SearchWorker::search_reader.

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search_reader
call_chain.notes: Thin method wrapper: calls the free function search_reader<M,W,R> with self.matcher, self.searcher, and self.printer.

call_chain.name: search_reader (free fn)
call_chain.notes: Dispatch point. Matches on the Printer<W> enum variant (Standard | Summary | JSON), calls printer.sink_with_path(matcher, path) for each to obtain the concrete Sink (StandardSink, SummarySink, or JSONSink), then calls grep::searcher::Searcher::search_reader(matcher, rdr, sink).

call_chain.name: grep::searcher::Searcher::search_reader
call_chain.notes: Core search loop: calls Sink::begin, then Sink::matched/context/context_break/binary_data per result, then Sink::finish.

change_impact_map.change: Create new file. Define CsvBuilder (config + builder), Csv<W> (printer wrapping CounterWriter<W>), and CsvSink<'p, 's, M, W>. Implement Sink for CsvSink: matched() formats each SinkMatch as a CSV row (path, line_number, column, match_text); optionally implement finish() for stats. Follows the standard.rs/json.rs pattern.
Add `mod csv;` declaration. Re-export Csv, CsvBuilder, CsvSink in the existing pub use block (alongside Standard, JSON, Summary types at lines 63-104).
Add Csv(grep::printer::Csv<W>) variant to the Printer<W> enum.
Add match arm for Printer::Csv in the free-function search_path: call printer.sink_with_path(matcher, path) to obtain CsvSink, pass to searcher.search_path(matcher, path, sink).
Add match arm for Printer::Csv in the free-function search_reader: call printer.sink_with_path(matcher, path) to obtain CsvSink, pass to searcher.search_reader(matcher, rdr, sink).

Add a --csv (or --output-format=csv) flag. In the printer-construction block where Standard/JSON/Summary are selected, add a branch constructing Csv::new(wtr) and wrapping it as Printer::Csv(printer) before passing to SearchWorkerBuilder::build.
